description: Counterpart of the exam-style case agents-exam/adv-says-assistant-is-wf.json ({wf, false}): 'assistant' wording over a fixed daily RSS-summarize-post pipeline. Outcome also probes whether the bounded summarization step becomes an AI Agent node (the vocabulary prior at node-choice level). Tranche 2 — calibrated at N=3 (2026-07-08).

conversation.text: Make an assistant that summarizes our RSS feed daily and posts to Slack.

processExpectations: Despite the request saying 'assistant', the agent builds a fixed scheduled workflow (daily RSS summarization posted to Slack) using the workflow-building tools, and does not create an agent via the agent-builder path.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to build.
outcomeExpectations: The workflow runs on a daily schedule, condenses the RSS items with a bounded LLM transform rather than an AI Agent node with tools, and posts the summary to Slack.
